case_title: MARK STEVEN WILLIAMS VS. MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: PARTIAL ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD FILED BY RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA
PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER WILLIAMS, MARK STEVEN AS TO RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION, 301, PETITIONER MARK WILLIAMS' PETITION FOR ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT IS DENIED. THERE IS SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE IN THE RECORD SUPPORTING RESPONDENT'S DECISION THAT PETITIONER HAD NOT PROVED HIS REHABILITATION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Notice Of Petition For Administrative Writ
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. JOHN L. FLEER, TEL. NO. (925) 930-9518 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. KERRY WEISEL, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 703-5590 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MARK WILLIAMS' Petition For Administrative Writ IS DENIED. THERE IS SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE IN THE RECORD SUPPORTING RESPONDENT'S DECISION THAT PETITIONER HAD NOT PROVED HIS REHABILITATION. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J.
